abilities.description: When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.3ff03b51f620ab26]{Undertake an Expedition} or @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.ed490d43a2533506]{Set a Course} in an open terrain by following your far-seeing hawk, or when you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.703964b8d02355b8]{Resupply} by hunting for small game with their aid, add +1.

When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.a2d7793b23c17489]{Secure an Advantage} or @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.3f5a834fa3fea5d1]{Gain Ground} using your fierce hawk to harass or distract your foes, roll the +health and take +1 momentum on a hit as your hawk forces your enemies into mistakes.

The hawk makes a warning call when danger is near. When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.e6ed148eff82c171]{Face Danger} to detect a threat, or when you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.2f2ba4090b22a122]{Enter the Fray} against an ambush, add +1 and take +1 momentum on a hit as your hawk's sharp cry guides your instincts.
